question: What can be said about the crowd in the image? Select from the following options: (A) They are uninterested in the game. (B) They are actively cheering and shouting. (C) They are sitting calmly and quietly. (D) They are watching on their phones.
gold_answer: They are sitting calmly and quietly
answer_choices: They are uninterested in the game
They are actively cheering and shouting
They are sitting calmly and quietly
They are watching on their phones
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
